name: Memory Dream
description: Auto-consolidates agent memory files after sessions — like REM sleep for AI agents

intervalHours.description: Alias for minHours — minimum hours between consolidations

model.description: Model override for consolidation (defaults to agent default)

captureModel.description: Model override for capture phase (defaults to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001)

enableCapture.description: Enable in-session auto-capture of corrections and preferences
